name: Cheddar Vegetable Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen chopped spinach, thawed and well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Saute mushrooms in 1 tbsp margarine until tender; remove from skillet.
3. Saute carrots and onions in remaining 1 tbsp margarine for 5 minutes or until carrots are tender.
4. Reduce heat to medium.
5. Blend in flour. Gradually add milk; cook, stirring constantly, until thickened. Stir in mushrooms.
6. For first layer, arrange 3 noodles in bottom of greased 13x9-inch baking dish. Top with half the cheddar cheese and half the vegetable mixture.
7. Cover vegetable mixture with 3 noodles and combined cottage cheese and spinach.
8. Repeat first layer. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
9. Bake for 30 minutes; sprinkle with parsley. Let stand 10 minutes.
